contracts.applies_to: The top-skill package as loaded by an AI runtime.
dependencies: orchestrator routing depends on workflow/orchestrator-protocol.md
delivery certification depends on workflow/enforcement-evidence-model.md
validation output depends on workflow/handoff-artifact-format.md
delivery evidence hard gates depend on scripts/validate_execution_evidence.py
runner workflow gates depend on workflow/runner-contract.md and scripts/top_protocol_runner.py
runner-enforced isolation depends on workflow/pass-invocation-contract.md
llm-api runner evidence depends on workflow/llm-api-adapter-contract.md and scripts/adapters/llm_api_adapter.py
repair-loop delivery depends on workflow/repair-pass-contract.md and post-repair judicial validation
delivery certification depends on workflow/delivery-certification-procedure.md and scripts/certify_orchestration_run.py
stale certification detection depends on top/schemas/certification-snapshot.schema.json

run state tracking depends on workflow/run-state-machine.md, top/schemas/run-state.schema.json, scripts/update_orchestration_state.py, scripts/validate_orchestration_run.py, scripts/top_protocol_runner.py, and scripts/certify_orchestration_run.py
orchestration workflow driving depends on scripts/run_orchestration_workflow.py and the final scripts/validate_orchestration_run.py status
orchestration regression coverage depends on scripts/validate_orchestration_regressions.py and scripts/validate_orchestration_run.py
bounded repair artifact dogfood depends on task-capsule artifactWriteRequests, invocation-evidence artifactWrites, and scripts/validate_repair_artifact_fixture.py
orchestrated delivery-affecting work depends on workflow/activation-and-operating-procedure.md
orchestration run scaffolding depends on workflow/run-package-layout.md and scripts/create_orchestration_run.py
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for runtime skill loading and hydrated task execution. Hydration must validate references before stable work begins. Without external runner evidence, this contract is protocol-only and cannot certify runner-enforced delivery.

contracts.applies_to: The top-skill package when it is being maintained, released, or validated as a skill system.
dependencies: workflow/enforcement-evidence-model.md is the root contract for execution evidence
workflow/activation-and-operating-procedure.md defines when 2.0 orchestration is active and how passes operate
scripts/validate_execution_evidence.py is the executable gate for delivery evidence claims
workflow/runner-contract.md defines executable runner workflow and report obligations
workflow/pass-invocation-contract.md defines context package and invocation evidence obligations
workflow/llm-api-adapter-contract.md defines separate model/API pass invocation obligations
workflow/repair-pass-contract.md defines repair authority, attempt limits, and post-repair judicial validation obligations
workflow/delivery-certification-procedure.md defines the post-run delivery certification gate
scripts/top_protocol_runner.py validates runner workflow artifacts and hard-check exit codes
scripts/adapters/llm_api_adapter.py executes one pass through an LLM API and records invocation evidence
scripts/certify_orchestration_run.py writes validation report, delivery certification, and final audit artifacts from runner evidence and judicial handoff
top/schemas/certification-snapshot.schema.json defines stale certification snapshot shape
workflow/run-state-machine.md defines run package process states
workflow/run-package-layout.md defines the canonical run package layout
scripts/create_orchestration_run.py creates protocol-defined scaffold packages and bounded llm-api smoke run packages
scripts/update_orchestration_state.py derives run-state.json from runner, judicial, certification, and snapshot artifacts
scripts/validate_orchestration_run.py verifies one run package as RUN_VALID certified, RUN_VALID not-certified, RUN_STALE, or RUN_INVALID
scripts/validate_orchestration_regressions.py proves known false-complete scenarios remain blocked
scripts/validate_repair_artifact_fixture.py validates the repair artifact dogfood output
scripts/run_orchestration_workflow.py coordinates create, runner, certification, snapshot verification, and final verifier status
scripts/top_protocol_runner.py and scripts/certify_orchestration_run.py refresh run-state.json after evidence-changing operations
top/schemas/run-state.schema.json defines run-state.json shape
top/schemas/delivery-certification.schema.json depends on top/schemas/fragments/execution-evidence.schema.json
top/schemas/validation-report.schema.json depends on workflow/handoff-artifact-format.md
agents/orchestrator-agent.md depends on workflow/task-capsule-format.md and workflow/orchestrator-protocol.md
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for top-skill maintenance and release claims. The skill is not release-ready if these artifacts are missing, stale, contradicted by root package metadata, or unable to express independent judicial validation before delivery certification. A ready protocol-layer release must not claim runner-enforced isolation unless runner evidence is present.

contracts.applies_to: A target project undergoing TOP migration.
contracts.readiness_rule: Use for migration-mode tasks that create or change TOP artifacts in a target project. Branch workflow JSON is the machine-readable process graph; the branch plan is human-readable intent; the shared log is append-only evidence; shared status must preserve previous branch history.
